register.title: Sign up
register.info_body_1: Sign up as a coach to create and manage your training programs.
register.info_body_2: After signing up, you can invite your students by email from your dashboard.
register.info_note_body: Students can only join through their coach's invitation.
register.student_invite_body: If you have an invitation code from your coach, click here:

errors.first_name_min: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.last_name_min: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.password_pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit
errors.accept_cgu_required: You must accept the Terms of Service to sign up
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

student_register.title: Student sign-up
student_register.info_body_1: Students can only join Kaiylo through their coach's invitation.
student_register.info_body_2: If you don't have an invitation code, contact your coach to receive one.
student_register.info_note_body: Each invitation code can only be used once.
student_register.email_placeholder: Email will be set by your invitation
student_register.email_set_by_invitation: Your email is automatically set by your invitation
student_register.coach_block_body: Sign up as a coach to create and manage your training programs:

errors.first_name_min: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.last_name_min: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.password_pattern: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit
errors.accept_cgu_required: You must accept the Terms of Service to sign up
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

forgot_password.title: Reset your password
forgot_password.success_body: If an account exists with this email address, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.success_help: Check your inbox and spam folder.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.success_body: Your password has been updated successfully.
reset_password.success_redirect: You'll be redirected to the sign-in page...
reset_password.invalid_link_body: We couldn't verify your session. The reset link may have expired or already been used.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirm_email.loading_body: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
confirm_email.success_default_message: Your email has been confirmed successfully! You can now sign in.
confirm_email.success_redirect: Redirecting to sign-in in a few seconds...

errors.expired_link: This confirmation link has expired. Please request a new confirmation link from the sign-in page.
errors.access_denied: Invalid or expired confirmation link. Please request a new confirmation link.
errors.generic_prefix: Confirmation error: {{detail}}. Please try again or contact support.
errors.wrong_link_type: Wrong link type. This link doesn't match an email confirmation.
errors.token_missing: Invalid confirmation link. Token is missing.
errors.expired_or_invalid: This confirmation link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new confirmation link from the sign-in page.
errors.already_confirmed: Your email has already been confirmed. You can now sign in.
errors.no_user_data: Confirmation failed. No user data returned.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

registration_success.title: Your account has been created successfully!
registration_success.spam_help: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or contact support.

errors.no_oauth_code: No OAuth code found in the URL
errors.student_desktop_blocked: Student access is only available on mobile or tablet. Please use a mobile device to sign in.
